sources: National Reentry Resource Center Clean Slate Clearinghouse (nationalreentryresourcecenter.org/cleanslate)
meta.notes: v1 lean curation. Universal NRRC fallback shown for every state. Curated highlights for CA/NY/TX/GA only. Rasa Legal added as a low-cost ($25 attorney eligibility review) option in UT/PA/AZ. Org details verified from each org's public website at compile time.

universal.label: Clean Slate Clearinghouse — Find a Lawyer
universal.description: Search the National Reentry Resource Center's clearinghouse for record-clearance attorneys in your state and ZIP code.
